The '''Trasse Proving Grounds''' were a secret [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] factory complex on [[Trasse/Legends|Trasse]] that constructed [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transports]]. As part of the manufacturing process, the AT-ATs were tested in outdoor firing ranges by firing on prisoners. There were two of these ranges, one for infantry and one for armor.

After his defection to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], [[Brenn Tantor]] used the knowledge of fellow defector [[Beri Tulon]], who had been stationed at the facility, to [[Mission to Trasse|raid]] it and steal an AT-AT walker.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''
